steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
The fraction is already in simplest form.
$$f(17)=\dfrac1617$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. It's given that $f\left(x\right)=\frac{16}{x}$. Substituting $17$ for $x$ in this function yields $f\left(17\right)=\frac{16}{17}$. Therefore, when $x=17$, the value of $f\left(x\right)$ is $\frac{16}{17}$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of the reciprocal of $f\left(x\right)$ when $x=17$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $f\left(x\right)$ when $x=1$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $x$ when $x=17$.
